title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
